text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, is that true?! Biwa Hayahide's quitting
running because of her injury from the Tenno Sho
last fall?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: That's what I heard. Sigh... It's a real shame. I loved watching Hayahide run.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No kidding. I really wanted to see her face off
against Brian too.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Say, Brian. How about a scrimmage?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to the day I can face off
against you as a rival. I still can't do the distance
of a regular race, but perhaps if it was shor—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Brian, just keep on running ahead. Don't look
back.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Why'd she say it wasn't possible back then?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What did she mean by "don't look back"?!

Narita Brian tackles her training with a ghastly
vigor in preparation for her next big race—the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Huff... Gasp... Huff

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff... One more time... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Narita Brian! Can I get an interview? Even just
a few words will do!
choice_data_list: We're in the middle of training...

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Just excuse me for a few seconds! With Biwa
Hayahide's return to the Twinkle Series being
ruled hopeless, what do you—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Cut it out.

text_block_list.name: Reporter
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Stop talking about my sister!

The air goes ice cold in an instant. Her voice is
filled with an astonishing anger.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Ugh!

I spare one last glance for the reporter, whose
face is pale and stricken, and then run after
Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Tch! What do you do when your dream turns out
to be an illusion you can never catch?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
All these idiots blabbing nonsense about my
sister—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the outburst. I'll go back to the training
track later.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Just leave me alone for now. Go on and get out
of here.

First there was the news after the autumn Tenno
Sho a few days ago. And now, the reporter's
questions today...

Narita Brian seems to have a disproportionately
strong reaction whenever her sister, Biwa
Hayahide, is brought up.
choice_data_list: Are you worried about your sister?
Are you worried about your sister?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Stop!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just... stop talking about her. Please.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: My sister...

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hurry up, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: She was always ahead of me...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm not going to give up on that race so easily!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Just leave me alone already.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I get it. Even without my sister, there are still
hordes of strong opponents to face in the Twinkle
Series.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
This is a place where only the most dauntless
remain, after all. It's hardly surprising that some
would be cast aside.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Even if it's Sis...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...She's not coming back. That's the reality of it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
The thought of hurting someone else just by
existing is... scary, sad, and really awful. But...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to give up on running...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You were always up ahead, out of reach. Then,
before I knew it, it was over. ...But then again,
this is what usually happens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But I'll catch up for sure next time!
The racer called the Sable Assassin...
And the one that everyone thinks can't win.

Both have feelings that differ from the reality that
others see.
choice_data_list: The Twinkle Series is full of strong racers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: I think your sister is strong too.
I think your sister is strong too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Of course she's strong! She's my sister!

In an effort not to disturb her, I gently close my
eyes and turn the other way.
But I can hear her choked sobs behind me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hayahide? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...I'm wondering if she's still doing her best right
now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. But we're not about to lose either! Are you
ready, Ticket?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You bet! Hey, Doc!

text_block_list.name: Physical Therapist
text_block_list.text:
Yes, sorry to keep you waiting! Today's rehab is
going to be especially difficult.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm counting on it!

text_block_list.name: Physical Therapist
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, your spirits haven't fallen at all since last
year. You're both very impressive.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Naturally. I want to get back to the Twinkle Series
as soon as possible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...There's no need to waste time worrying over
me. I'm Narita Brian's big sis, after all.
